Author: GitHub
Title: Open Source Friday with aboutcode.org
Description:
Join Philippe Ombredanne, creator of ScanCode and contributor to ClearlyDefined, as he discusses building open source tools and standards for secure software supply chains. Philippe maintains critical projects like Package-URL, SPDX, and CycloneDX that help organizations understand and manage their software dependencies.

We'll explore how open data and open standards foster healthier software ecosystems, dive into the aboutcode.org toolkit, and discuss practical approaches to software composition analysis.
